description: VLM multi-modal vision reasoning — analyze screen content and images using a Qwen-VL vision-language model. Use for deep visual understanding tasks that go beyond OCR text extraction and YOLO object detection: describing images, interpreting diagrams, reading complex UI layouts, understanding visual context.

function.name: VLM_Action_AnalyzeScreen
function.description:
Capture the current screen and send it to the Qwen-VL multi-modal model for deep visual analysis. The model can describe what it sees, interpret UI layouts, read and understand text in context, analyze charts/diagrams, and answer questions about the screen content.

Unlike OCR (which only extracts raw text) and YOLO (which only detects object classes), VLM provides human-like visual understanding — it can describe relationships between elements, explain what's happening on screen, and reason about visual content.

When to use:
- User asks 'what's on my screen?' and wants a descriptive answer
- Understanding complex UI layouts (panels, sidebars, dialogs) with context
- Analyzing charts, graphs, or diagrams visible on screen
- Getting a human-readable description of screen content
- Multi-step visual reasoning about what's displayed
- When OCR+YOLO results are insufficient to answer the user's question

When NOT to use:
- Simple text extraction (use OCR: ScreenCaptureAction_CaptureScreen)
- Just detecting objects/buttons (use YOLO: ScreenCaptureAction_DetectObjects)
- Quick positional checks

COOPERATION: VLM complements OCR and YOLO. For complete screen understanding, you can use all three together — OCR for raw text, YOLO for object bounding boxes, and VLM for contextual interpretation.

PromptString.description: The question or prompt about the screen content. Examples: 'Describe what's on the screen', 'What error dialog is showing?', 'Explain the chart in the current window', 'What application is running and what is its state?'

function.name: VLM_Action_AnalyzeImage
function.description:
Send a Base64-encoded image to the Qwen-VL multi-modal model for deep visual analysis. Use this when you already have an image (from a previous tool result, clipboard, or file) and want the VLM to analyze it.

Unlike AnalyzeScreen (which auto-captures the current screen), this tool accepts any Base64-encoded image — useful for analyzing saved screenshots, images from the clipboard, or images from web pages.

PromptString.description: The question or prompt about the image. Examples: 'Describe this image', 'What objects are in this picture?', 'Read the text in this screenshot'.

examples.user: Describe what's on my screen right now.

arguments.PromptString: 请详细描述当前屏幕上的内容，包括所有窗口、图标、文本和UI元素。
这个屏幕上显示了什么错误信息？请读取错误对话框中的文字内容。
请详细描述这张截图中的内容。
